questionHtml: The Great Nebula is located in Orion. Describe, using the Jeans criterion, the necessary condition for a nebula to form a star.
markschemeHtml:
mass of gas cloud > Jeans mass ✔

«magnitude of» gravitational potential energy > Ek of particles ✔

cloud collapses/coalesces «to form a protostar» ✔

meta.title: The Great Nebula is located in Orion. Describe, using the Jeans criterion, the necessary condition for a nebula to form a star.
